title: MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL ANNOUNCES ORGANIZATIONAL STRUCTURE AND EXECUTIVE APPOINTMENTS
text: BETHESDA, Md. , Feb. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR) today announced its organizational structure and executive appointments designed to tap its talented leadership bench and accelerate the company's growth.

title: Marriott International: Strong RevPAR Growth Despite Inflationary Pressures
text: Marriott International has continued to see strong RevPAR growth across its Ritz-Carlton brand despite inflationary pressures. Additionally, the stock is trading at an attractive P/E ratio relative to its peers.

title: MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL APPOINTS SABA LANDMANN SENIOR VICE PRESIDENT, GLOBAL BRAND AND PORTFOLIO PR
text: BETHESDA, Md. , Feb. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marriott International, Inc. today announced that it has appointed Saba Landmann, Senior Vice President, Global Brand and Portfolio PR, effective immediately.

title: 2 Stocks to Consider Buying After Strong Q4 Results
text: Both Ecolab (ECL) and Marriott (MAR) stocks look more attractive following better-than-expected Q4 results and strong guidance.

title: Should You Make Room For Marriott In Your Portfolio?
text: The company reported $1.96 per share, up 51% from a year ago. Revenue was $5.293 billion, a gain of 33%.

title: Marriott room rates rose 22% in 2022 to top prepandemic prices
text: Shares of Marriott International Inc. rallied toward an eight-month high Tuesday after the hotel operator reported profit and revenue that beat expectations, with a big increase in room rates providing a boost.

title: Marriott (MAR) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Marriott's (MAR) fourth-quarter 2022 performance benefits from solid leisure demand, fee-driven, asset-light business model and price strength.

title: Marriott International reports 'terrific' 4Q results, shares rise
text: Marriott International (NYSE:MAR) Inc shares rose Tuesday after the hotel chain's fourth-quarter results beat expectations on the top and bottom lines.  The Bethesda, Maryland-based company posted $5.92 billion in revenue, up from $4.45 billion in 2021 and ahead of Street expectations of $5.47 billion.

title: Marriott Stock: Hotel Giant Delivers Strong Earnings, Guidance Amid Travel Rebound
text: Marriott earnings rose amid a travel rebound that's continuing into 2023. Wyndham Hotels is due Wednesday.

title: Marriott stock rallies toward 8-month high after profit and revenue beat expectations and outlook was upbeat
text: Shares of Marriott International Inc. MAR, +1.75% rallied1.2% toward an eight-month high in premarket trading Tuesday, after the hotel operator reported fourth-quarter profit and revenue that beat expectations, and provided an upbeat first-quarter outlook. Net income rose to $673 million, or $2.12 a share, from $468 million, or $1.42 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2022 RESULTS
text: Fourth quarter 2022 comparable systemwide constant dollar RevPAR increased 28.8 percent worldwide, 23.6 percent in the U.S. & Canada, and 45.1 percent in international markets, compared to the 2021 fourth quarter;  Fourth quarter 2022 comparable systemwide constant dollar RevPAR increased 4.6 percent worldwide, 5.2 percent in the U.S. & Canada, and 3.4 percent in international markets, compared to the 2019 fourth quarter;  Fourth quarter reported diluted EPS totaled $2.12, compared to reported diluted EPS of $1.42 in the year-ago quarter.  Fourth quarter adjusted diluted EPS totaled $1.96, compared to fourth quarter 2021 adjusted diluted EPS of $1.30; Fourth quarter reported net income totaled $673 million, compared to reported net income of $468 million in the year-ago quarter.

title: 3 Romantic Stocks to Buy for Valentine's Day
text: A quick look around retail shops across the U.S. can tell anyone that Valentine's Day 2023 is quickly approaching. Many Americans have already made plans for excursions with their loved ones and, while the experienced romantics have likely already booked their dinner reservations and hotel rooms, those who didn't prepare will likely be scrambling for plans today.

title: Why Marriott (MAR) Might Surprise This Earnings Season
text: Marriott (MAR) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Marriott announces dividend, additional title for CEO
text: Marriott International Inc.'s board of directors have declared a quarterly cash dividend of 40 cents per share, the company announced Friday. The dividend will be payable March 31 to shareholders of record as of Feb. 24.

title: Marriott International Board of Directors Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend; Appoints Current CEO Anthony Capuano as President and CEO
text: BETHESDA, Md. , Feb. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marriott International (Nasdaq: MAR) today announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of 40 cents per share of common stock.

title: Factors Setting the Tone for Marriott's (MAR) Q4 Earnings
text: Marriott's (MAR) fourth-quarter performance is likely to have benefited from robust leisure demand and business and cross-border travel improvements.
